title: Blackbeard’s Name Is Heard
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on blackbeard’s name is heard, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Blackbeard’s Name Is Heard. Kureha fires Hiriluk’s final miracle into the snow, sending Chopper off beneath cherry blossoms and a new flag. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Chopperr!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Hey Chopperr! How long are ya gonna sit there moping!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Come and drink with us!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Those cherry blossoms were sure pretty though.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yo Nami, look! I learned this from Yosaku!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: didn't think I'd get to see something like that in a snow country!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You said it! And what better time than now is there for a drink?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Would it kill you to pay some attention over here too!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What, those two look alive to me.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Carue! What were you doing out frozen in the river!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Quick

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Carueeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Quick quick quick... quick quick...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Maybe he slipped and fell in? Haha, clumsy lil' guy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You stay quiet, Mr. Bushido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He said he saw someone called zero disappear in the river,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So he jumped inside to rescue him but ended up becoming frozen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So this was your fault!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You can understand what Carue is saying, Tony?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, I was originally a normal animal so I can communicate with other animals.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: That's amazing, Chopper! You're not only well versed in medical skills,

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: But you can talk to animals too!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: compared in accordance in approximately

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You seem plenty happy to me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait Nami, what do you mean by "medical skills?"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!? Chopperr, you're a doctor!?

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: If you didn't know that, then why on earth did you invite him onboard?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He's a cool Reindeer that can transform into 7 different forms, duh.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Emergency food supply.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Ah-

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Oh no! I forgot to bring my surgical tools,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Because I was too busy trying to escape!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Then what's this? It was already inside the sleigh.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: My backpack! But how!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: How?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I thought it was you, no?

summary: This part highlights blackbeard’s name is heard and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
